notes: This mapping is fixed before unified evaluation.
FSIBP cluster IDs are intentionally absent: one cluster can mix several coarse semantic tags.
Unknown source labels must map to other_or_unknown rather than being guessed during evaluation.
BinPRE Static is mapped to identifier and Aligned is mapped to data_value by experiment convention; their source-code meanings are broader than those coarse tags.
BinPRE CheckSum and Filename are mapped to data_value by experiment convention.
BinPRE artifact label Bit Field corresponds to the paper's Integer semantic type; it does not mean bit-level field-boundary inference.
